name: aurac
description: Aura language bytecode compiler and VM

scripts.check:all: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$failed = $false; Get-ChildItem -Path ../examples -Filter *.aura | ForEach-Object { node dist/main.js check $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $failed = $true } }; if ($failed) { exit 1 }"
scripts.test:examples: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$failed = $false; @('../examples/data_types.aura','../examples/functions.aura','../examples/interfaces.aura','../examples/imports_map_filter.aura','../examples/math_library.aura','../examples/logistic_iris_csv.aura','../examples/logistic_wdbc_csv.aura','../examples/logistic_heart_csv.aura','../examples/dnn_xor.aura','../examples/dnn_blobs.aura','../examples/dnn_regression.aura','../examples/dnn_wdbc_table.aura') | ForEach-Object { node dist/main.js run $_; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $failed = $true } }; if ($failed) { exit 1 }"
scripts.check:strict: npm run check:all && npm run test:examples && npm run check:conformance
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/main.js test ../tests
scripts.run:data_types: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/data_types.aura
scripts.run:loops: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/loops.aura
scripts.run:functions: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/functions.aura
scripts.run:interfaces: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/interfaces.aura
scripts.run:classes_oop: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/classes_oop.aura
scripts.run:native_data_structures: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/native_data_structures.aura
scripts.run:imports_map_filter: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/imports_map_filter.aura
scripts.run:math_library: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/math_library.aura
scripts.run:logistic_heart: npm run build && node dist/main.js run ../examples/logistic_heart_csv.aura
